title: Knowledge Demon

moves.title: Curse of Knowledge
effects: Force each target to choose a card to add to their deck
Disintegration (6/7/8 damage based on cycle) or status debuff (MindRot, Sloth, or WasteAway)

move_pattern: Cycles Curse of Knowledge → Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder for 3 complete cycles. After the 3rd Ponder, enters a repeating pattern of Slap → Knowledge Overwhelming → Ponder.
notes: Knowledge Demon cycles through its move sequence with the Curse of Knowledge move available only for the first 3 cycles. Each Curse of Knowledge forces each player to choose between a Disintegration card (with scaling damage: 6 on cycle 1, 7 on cycle 2, 8 on cycle 3) or a status debuff card (MindRot, Sloth, or WasteAway depending on the cycle). The Knowledge Overwhelming attack triggers a burnt visual state which is maintained until Ponder is used. In multiplayer, Ponder heals 30 HP per player rather than a flat 30.
